audit_items.proof_trace: AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet returns NULL on memory allocation failure, but its return value is not checked before dereferencing random_info[0] at line 511 and random_info[id] at lines 581, 689, etc., causing NULL pointer dereference.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker can trigger memory exhaustion causing allocation failure, leading to NULL dereference and segmentation fault via EvaluateImages API.
